meaning: n.(某一时期,地区或环境内的)鸟类,鸟类志
examples: The character of avifauna and the bird ecological group in this reserve were analysed.
One third of the amphibious animals are threatened, while this figure for avifauna is 12%, and that for mammal is 22%, according to a survey of the global specimens.
According to the data obtained from the study, the avifauna in Lashihai wetland can be divided into 4 communities: water surface area, swamp, agricultural farmland and forest vegetation.
